fact_nuggets.text: Soundproof (Japanese: Soundproof) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Blocks the effects of all moves that use sound. MD T D S Protects the Pokemon from the effects of any sound-based move. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokemon takes no damage from the effects of moves using sound! MD RT DX The Pokemon is not affected by the effects of moves that use sound, such as Growl or Uproar. But this also blocks those moves when a teammate uses them.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III and IV 1.1.2 Generation V 1.1.3 Generation VI to VII 1.1.4 Generation VIII 1.1.5 Sound-based moves 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Soundproof makes the Pokemon immune to sound-based moves . Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon with Soundproof are immune to all sound-based moves, including their own. Pokemon with Soundproof, including inactive Pokemon, are not affected by Heal Bell . A sleeping Pokemon with this Ability cannot be woken with a Pok Flute . In Generation III and IV only, Pokemon with this Ability can still fall asleep during an uproar . Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon with Soundproof can now be affected by Heal Bell. Generation VI to VII [ edit | edit source ] Active Pokemon with Soundproof cannot be affected by Heal Bell. (Inactive Pokemon can be affected by Heal Bell even if they have Soundproof.) Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon with Soundproof are no longer immune to their own sound-based moves. Sound-based moves [ edit | edit source ] The Ability affects the following moves: Move Type Cat. III IV V VI VII VIII IX Alluring Voice Fairy Special Boomburst Normal Special Bug Buzz Bug Special Chatter Flying Special Clanging Scales Dragon Special Clangorous Soul Dragon Status Clangorous Soulblaze Dragon Special Confide Normal Status Disarming Voice Fairy Special Echoed Voice Normal Special Eerie Spell Psychic Special Grass Whistle Grass Status Growl Normal Status Heal Bell Normal Status Howl Normal Status Hyper Voice Normal Special Metal Sound Steel Status Noble Roar Normal Status Overdrive Electric Special Parting Shot Dark Status Perish Song Normal Status Psychic Noise Psychic Special Relic Song Normal Special Roar Normal Status Round Normal Special Screech Normal Status Shadow Panic * Shadow Status Sing Normal Status Snarl Dark Special Snore Normal Special Sparkling Aria Water Special Supersonic Normal Status Torch Song Fire Special Uproar Normal Special Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Soundproof has no effect outside of battle.
